title: WorkspaceCatalogEntry
description: Human-authored metadata for one app or library.

id.description: Stable id; usually the directory name under apps/ or lib/.

summary.description: One-line description for portal cards and API consumers.

status.description: published = on Pages portal; local = source-only / no demo; draft/archived = listed but filtered by consumers.

package.description: npm package name when applicable (esp. libs).

sourcePath.description: Repo-relative source path. Defaults from workspace defaults + kind + id.

demoPath.description: Path under Pages root (e.g. liquid-lab/). null disables demo link even if published.

links.description: Absolute URL overrides. Omitted keys are resolved from templates.

portal.description: Include on the home portal. Default: true when status is published.

portalSection.description: Portal frame for published apps. playground = Apps grid; research = Research grid (separate from demos). Default: playground.
